PHASE: Phase 4 Part 5d complete
LAST_DONE: Part 5d — Meeting Management UI + multi-participant LiveKit room + CallLog persistence. 9 new files / 4 modified, merged as commit ec50f4f. 5d-1 (meetings router + list/new pages + ctx narrowing + speed-dial wiring) was dispatched to Sonnet but thrashed at ~25 tools / 13 min — Opus recovered all 6 files (relation-name fixes host/participants/role_in_meeting, display_name not name, removed bogus `server-only` import, fixed /app/meeting/[id] singular link path, created missing _meeting-form.tsx, wired speed-dial-grid.tsx). 5d-2 (meeting room + CallLog) was implemented directly by Opus per Step 2.5b after the 5d-1 thrash; 6 files (use-meeting-room.ts, meeting-controls.tsx, meeting-room.tsx, /app/meeting/[id]/page.tsx, call-log.ts + meetings.getJoinToken/end + calls.end). tRPC middleware chain inlined in protectedProcedure (procedure.use(...).use(...).use(...)) so ctx.user propagates through tenant + rate-limit steps — eliminates 4 advisory non-null-assertion warnings. Prisma.MeetingUncheckedCreateInput cast used in create + end mutations so L6 runtime injection coexists with strict TS create input types (explicit organization_id from ctx.organizationId; L6 still wins at runtime). meetings.getJoinToken status-gates ended/cancelled (FORBIDDEN), locked-non-host (FORBIDDEN), and promotes scheduled→active + stamps started_at on first join. meetings.end is host-only, idempotent (alreadyEnded return), writes single CallLog. calls.end writes intercom CallLog with caller-supplied startedAt + participantCount + status enum. MeetingRoom uses @livekit/components-react's RoomContext + GridLayout + ParticipantTile pattern mirroring IntercomCall; MeetingControls wraps TrackToggles for mic/camera/screen-share + Leave + host-gated End-for-all (display + server enforced). pnpm -w typecheck + pnpm -w lint PASS (7 tasks each, FULL TURBO cache hit on re-run).
NEXT: Phase 4 Part 5e — open NEW Claude Code session, say "Start Part 5e". Per execution-plan: Admin pages — /admin dashboard (Recharts), /admin/departments (CRUD + CSV import + device binding), /admin/users (invite + role + deactivate), /admin/settings, /admin/billing (Xendit checkout flow + plan upgrade), /admin/reports (CSV/PDF export trigger), /superadmin/* (uses platformPrisma — no L6 guard, per security.md "Super-admin queries" rule). Est. 12 files / ~78K → Tier 3, split into 2-3 Sonnet sub-dispatches per memory-governance.md §1 Step 2.5. Note: 5d showed that even tightly-scoped Sonnet dispatches can thrash if total accumulated tool result context exceeds 30K — for 5e, prefer 3 sub-dispatches of ≤4 files each rather than 2 sub-dispatches of 6 files each. Alternative: run /admin pages directly as Opus given platformPrisma + Recharts integration complexity. Also note: docs/DESIGN.md aesthetic should drive /admin dashboard chart styling — read it before scaffolding charts.
BLOCKERS: ⏳ CREDENTIALS.md placeholders must be filled before Phase 5 — GitHub PAT, Docker Hub token, SMTP, Komodo URL, Xendit keys, Turnstile prod keys, LiveKit keys. Phase 5e and beyond still proceed without them (admin pages + super-admin platform queries don't need external credentials; Xendit checkout UI will be 503-graceful when XENDIT_SECRET_KEY env unset, parallel to the existing LiveKit pattern).
